data.content: Implementation review: REQUEST CHANGES. Branch foolery-babd-codex-output (commit e76fb2a2) was forked from 54fea985 — before commits 566cb931 (codex deltas fix) and b0757c9a (approval-request visibility) landed on main. As-is, merging would (a) silently revert the approval-request-visibility module and its tests (src/lib/approval-request-visibility.ts, src/lib/__tests__/approval-request-visibility.test.ts, src/lib/__tests__/approval-request-runtime.test.ts, src/components/agent-history-utils.tsx changes — 4+ files / ~440 lines deleted from origin/main) and (b) hit real merge conflicts in src/lib/codex-jsonrpc-session.ts and src/lib/terminal-manager-format.ts where main's 566cb931 already shipped overlapping fixes. The babd refactor itself looks solid (translator/formatter split, 587 lines of focused tests, drops empty reasoning items, handles params.delta + summary[] + terminalInteraction + userMessage filter), but it needs to be rebased onto current origin/main before it can ship — otherwise it regresses the just-merged approval-request work and conflicts with the partial codex-delta fix already on main. Recommended next step: rebase foolery-babd-codex-output on origin/main, resolve the two conflicts so the babd refactor wins (it's a strict superset of 566cb931's logic), keep the approval-request files untouched, re-run quality gates, then re-enter implementation_review. Not advancing to shipment.
